items.title: Check Request Status
items.description: Use AuthHub request status to understand whether a client has opened, started, completed, or stalled a platform authorization flow.

items.title: Resend or Revoke a Request
items.description: Decide when to resend an AuthHub request versus revoking it and creating a clean replacement for the client.

items.title: Send Your Link
items.description: Share an AuthHub request link with the right client contact and reduce the back-and-forth that slows onboarding.
